name: wormhole
description: Worm-powered multi-agent orchestration protocol on top of OpenAI.
author: Pert

scripts.test: npm run build && node --test dist/__tests__/drift.test.js dist/__tests__/reward.test.js dist/__tests__/hoard.test.js dist/__tests__/federation.test.js dist/__tests__/audit.test.js dist/__tests__/reward-plugin.test.js dist/__tests__/graph.test.js dist/__tests__/ban-list.test.js dist/__tests__/concurrency.test.js dist/__tests__/budget.test.js dist/__tests__/run-store.test.js dist/__tests__/export-compare.test.js dist/__tests__/pack-prompt.test.js dist/__tests__/banners.test.js
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run clean && npm run build && npm test
